tEn: ProRL: Prolonged Reinforcement Learning Expands Reasoning Boundaries in Large Language Models
tZh: ProRL：延长强化学习扩展大语言模型的推理边界
sEn: Prolonged RL training can uncover novel reasoning strategies inaccessible to base models, expanding reasoning boundaries beyond mere amplification of existing outputs.
sZh: 延长强化学习训练能够发现基础模型无法触及的新推理策略，从而扩展推理边界，而不仅仅是放大已有输出。
absEn: Recent advances in reasoning-centric language models have highlighted reinforcement learning (RL) as a promising method for aligning models with verifiable rewards. However, it remains contentious whether RL truly expands a model's reasoning capabilities or merely amplifies high-reward outputs already latent in the base model's distribution, and whether continually scaling up RL compute reliably leads to improved reasoning performance. In this work, we challenge prevailing assumptions by demonstrating that prolonged RL (ProRL) training can uncover novel reasoning strategies that are inaccessible to base models, even under extensive sampling. We introduce ProRL, a novel training methodology that incorporates KL divergence control, reference policy resetting, and a diverse suite of tasks. Our empirical analysis reveals that RL-trained models consistently outperform base models across a wide range of pass@k evaluations, including scenarios where base models fail entirely regardless of the number of attempts. We further show that reasoning boundary improvements correlates strongly with task competence of base model and training duration, suggesting that RL can explore and populate new regions of solution space over time. These findings offer new insights into the conditions under which RL meaningfully expands reasoning boundaries in language models and establish a foundation for future work on long-horizon RL for reasoning. We release model weights to support further research: https://huggingface.co/nvidia/Nemotron-Research-Reasoning-Qwen-1.5B
absZh: 近期以推理为中心的语言模型进展凸显了强化学习（RL）作为将模型与可验证奖励对齐的一种有前景的方法。然而，关于RL是否真正扩展了模型的推理能力，还是仅仅放大了基础模型分布中已有的高奖励输出，以及持续扩大RL计算量是否可靠地提升推理性能，仍存在争议。在本工作中，我们通过展示延长RL（ProRL）训练能够发现基础模型即使在大量采样下也无法触及的新推理策略，挑战了现有假设。我们提出了ProRL，一种结合KL散度控制、参考策略重置和多样化任务套件的新型训练方法。我们的实证分析表明，RL训练模型在广泛的pass@k评估中始终优于基础模型，包括基础模型无论尝试多少次都完全失败的情景。我们进一步表明，推理边界的改进与基础模型的任务能力和训练时长密切相关，这表明RL能够随时间探索和填充解空间的新区域。这些发现为RL在何种条件下有意义地扩展语言模型推理边界提供了新见解，并为未来关于长时域RL推理的研究奠定了基础。我们发布了模型权重以支持进一步研究：https://huggingface.co/nvidia/Nemotron-Research-Reasoning-Qwen-1.5B

contrib.en: Proposes ProRL, a prolonged RL training methodology with KL divergence control and reference policy resetting.
contrib.zh: 提出ProRL，一种包含KL散度控制和参考策略重置的长时间强化学习训练方法。

contrib.en: Demonstrates that prolonged RL training expands reasoning boundaries beyond base model capabilities.
contrib.zh: 证明长时间强化学习训练能扩展推理边界，超越基础模型能力。

contrib.en: Achieves state-of-the-art performance on a 1.5B generalist reasoning model across diverse domains.
contrib.zh: 在1.5B通用推理模型上实现跨多个领域的最优性能。

contrib.en: Shows that RL gains are most significant on tasks where base model initially struggles.
contrib.zh: 表明强化学习增益在基础模型最初表现不佳的任务上最为显著。

contrib.en: Provides evidence of novel reasoning strategies emerging through prolonged RL training.
contrib.zh: 提供证据表明长时间强化学习训练中涌现出新的推理策略。

contrib.en: Releases model weights to support further research.
contrib.zh: 发布模型权重以支持进一步研究。

limits.en: Limited to 1.5B parameter models; scaling to larger models may require additional tuning.
limits.zh: 仅限于1.5B参数模型；扩展到更大模型可能需要额外调优。

limits.en: Training requires significant compute resources (16k GPU hours).
limits.zh: 训练需要大量算力资源（16k GPU小时）。

limits.en: Effectiveness depends on base model's initial competence; gains diminish on already strong tasks.
limits.zh: 有效性依赖于基础模型的初始能力；在已有强项任务上增益减弱。

limits.en: Evaluation limited to specific benchmarks; generalization to real-world tasks not fully validated.
limits.zh: 评估限于特定基准；对现实任务的泛化性未完全验证。

limits.en: Prolonged RL may lead to overthinking or reduced reasoning breadth on some tasks.
limits.zh: 长时间强化学习可能导致某些任务上的过度思考或推理广度降低。

items.en: Recent advances in reasoning-centric language models have highlighted reinforcement learning (RL) as a promising method for aligning models with verifiable rewards. However, it remains contentious whether RL truly expands a model’s reasoning capabilities or merely amplifies high-reward outputs already latent in the base model’s distribution, and whether continually scaling up RL compute reliably leads to improved reasoning performance. In this work, we challenge prevailing assumptions by demonstrating that prolonged RL (ProRL) training can uncover novel reasoning strategies that are inaccessible to base models, even under extensive sampling. We introduce ProRL, a novel training methodology that incorporates KL divergence control, reference policy resetting, and a diverse suite of tasks. Our empirical analysis reveals that RL-trained models consistently outperform base models across a wide range of pass@kk evaluations, including scenarios where base models fail entirely regardless of the number of attempts. We further show that reasoning boundary improvements correlates strongly with task competence of base model and training duration, suggesting that RL can explore and populate new regions of solution space over time. These findings offer new insights into the conditions under which RL meaningfully expands reasoning boundaries in language models and establish a foundation for future work on long-horizon RL for reasoning. We release model weights to support further research:
items.zh: 近期以推理为中心的语言模型进展凸显了强化学习（RL）作为将模型与可验证奖励对齐的一种有前景的方法。然而，RL 是否真正扩展了模型的推理能力，还是仅仅放大了基础模型分布中已存在的高奖励输出，以及持续扩展 RL 算力是否可靠地带来推理性能提升，这些问题仍存在争议。在本工作中，我们通过证明长时间 RL（ProRL）训练能够发现基础模型即使在大量采样下也无法获得的新推理策略，挑战了现有假设。我们提出了 ProRL，一种新颖的训练方法，包含 KL 散度控制、参考策略重置以及多样化的任务集。我们的实证分析表明，RL 训练的模型在广泛的 pass@k 评估中持续优于基础模型，包括基础模型无论尝试多少次都完全失败的情况。我们进一步表明，推理边界的改进与基础模型的任务能力和训练时长强相关，暗示 RL 可以随时间探索并填充解空间的新区域。这些发现为 RL 在何种条件下有意义地扩展语言模型推理边界提供了新见解，并为未来关于长时域 RL 推理的研究奠定了基础。我们发布模型权重以支持进一步研究：

items.en: https://huggingface.co/nvidia/Nemotron-Research-Reasoning-Qwen-1.5B
items.zh: https://huggingface.co/nvidia/Nemotron-Research-Reasoning-Qwen-1.5B

items.en: Recent advances in reasoning-focused language models, exemplified by OpenAI-O1 (jaech2024openai, ) and DeepSeek-R1 (guo2025deepseek, ), have marked a paradigm shift in artificial intelligence by scaling test-time computation. Specifically, test-time scaling enables long-form Chain-of-Thought (CoT) thinking and induces sophisticated reasoning behaviors, leading to remarkable improvements on complex tasks such as mathematical problem solving (deepscaler2025, ; yu2025dapoopensourcellmreinforcement, ; yue2025vapoefficientreliablereinforcement, ; zeng2025simplerlzooinvestigatingtamingzero, ) and code generation (deepcoder2025, ; code-r1, ). By continuously expending compute throughout the reasoning process—via exploration, verification, and backtracking—models boost their performance at the cost of generating longer reasoning traces.
items.zh: 近期以推理为中心的语言模型进展，以 OpenAI-O1 (jaech2024openai) 和 DeepSeek-R1 (guo2025deepseek) 为代表，通过扩展测试时算力标志着人工智能的范式转变。具体来说，测试时扩展实现了长链思维（CoT）思考，并诱导出复杂的推理行为，在复杂任务（如数学问题求解 (deepscaler2025; yu2025dapoopensourcellmreinforcement; yue2025vapoefficientreliablereinforcement; zeng2025simplerlzooinvestigatingtamingzero) 和代码生成 (deepcoder2025; code-r1)）上带来了显著改进。通过在推理过程中持续消耗算力——通过探索、验证和回溯——模型以生成更长推理轨迹为代价提升了性能。

items.en: At the heart of these advances lies reinforcement learning (RL), which has become instrumental in developing sophisticated reasoning capabilities. By optimizing against verifiable objective rewards rather than learned reward models, RL-based systems can mitigate the pitfalls of reward hacking (amodei2016concrete, ; weng2024rewardhack, ; wen2024language, ) and align more closely with correct reasoning processes. However, a fundamental question remains under active debate within the research community: Does reinforcement learning truly unlock new reasoning capabilities from a base model, or does it merely optimize the sampling efficiency of solutions already embedded in the base model?
items.zh: 这些进展的核心是强化学习（RL），它已成为开发复杂推理能力的关键工具。通过针对可验证的目标奖励而非学习到的奖励模型进行优化，基于 RL 的系统可以减轻奖励黑客攻击 (amodei2016concrete; weng2024rewardhack; wen2024language) 的陷阱，并与正确的推理过程更紧密地对齐。然而，一个基本问题在研究社区中仍存在激烈争论：强化学习是否真正从基础模型中解锁了新的推理能力，还是仅仅优化了基础模型中已嵌入的解决方案的采样效率？

items.capEn: Figure 1: Benefits of prolonged reinforcement learning (ProRL). Left: Pass@1 and Pass@16 scales with ProRL training. Middle: ProRL leads to more novel solutions reflected by higher Creativity Index lu2025aihumanityssalieriquantifying . Right: Our model greatly surpass base model across diverse tasks.
items.capZh: 图 1：长时间强化学习（ProRL）的益处。左图：Pass@1 和 Pass@16 随 ProRL 训练扩展。中图：ProRL 导致更多新颖解决方案，反映在更高的创造力指数 (lu2025aihumanityssalieriquantifying) 上。右图：我们的模型在多样化任务上大幅超越基础模型。

items.en: Recent studies (yue2025doesreinforcementlearningreally, ; dang_assessing_2025, ; zhao2025echochamberrlposttraining, ) argues for the latter, claiming that RL-trained models do not acquire new reasoning capabilities beyond what exists in their base models based on pass@kk metrics. We posit that these conclusions may stem from methodological constraints rather than fundamental limitations of RL approaches themselves. Specifically, we identify two key limitations in existing research: (1) an overreliance on specialized domains like mathematics, where models are often overtrained during both pre-training and post-training phases, thereby restricting the potential for exploration; and (2) the premature termination of RL training before models can fully explore and develop new reasoning capabilities based on a limited amount of RL training, typically no more than hundreds of steps yue2025doesreinforcementlearningreally .
items.zh: 最近的研究 (yue2025doesreinforcementlearningreally; dang_assessing_2025; zhao2025echochamberrlposttraining) 支持后一种观点，声称基于 pass@k 指标，RL 训练的模型并未获得超出其基础模型的新推理能力。我们认为这些结论可能源于方法论限制，而非 RL 方法本身的根本局限。具体来说，我们指出现有研究的两个关键限制：（1）过度依赖数学等专业领域，模型在预训练和后训练阶段往往过度训练，从而限制了探索潜力；（2）RL 训练过早终止，模型在有限 RL 训练（通常不超过数百步）下无法充分探索和开发新推理能力 (yue2025doesreinforcementlearningreally)。

items.en: In this study, we address these limitations through several key contributions. First, we introduce ProRL, a recipe designed to enable extended RL training periods that facilitate deeper exploration of reasoning strategies. It enables more than 2k training steps and scale the training data across diverse tasks—from traditional math and code tasks to STEM problems, logical puzzles, and instruction following, which, we hypothesize, are crucial for generalization. Using ProRL, we developed Nemotron-Research-Reasoning-Qwen-1.5B, the world’s best 1.5B reasoning model that significantly outperforms its base model, DeepSeek-R1-1.5B, and matches or even surpasses the performance of DeepSeek-R1-7B across a diverse range of benchmarks. Notably, compared to DeepSeek-R1-1.5B, we achieve average pass@1 improvements of 14.7% on math benchmarks, 13.9% on coding, 54.8% on logic puzzles, 25.1% on STEM reasoning, and 18.1% on instruction-following tasks (Figure˜1, Right). More importantly, ProRL demonstrates continued performance improvements after an unprecedented 2k training steps (Figure˜1, Left), suggesting that RL training scales effectively with increased compute.
items.zh: 在本研究中，我们通过几个关键贡献解决了这些限制。首先，我们引入了 ProRL，一种旨在实现长时间 RL 训练周期以促进推理策略更深层探索的方案。它支持超过 2000 个训练步骤，并将训练数据扩展到多样化任务——从传统数学和代码任务到 STEM 问题、逻辑谜题和指令遵循——我们假设这对泛化至关重要。使用 ProRL，我们开发了 Nemotron-Research-Reasoning-Qwen-1.5B，这是世界上最好的 1.5B 推理模型，显著优于其基础模型 DeepSeek-R1-1.5B，并在多样化基准上匹配甚至超越 DeepSeek-R1-7B 的性能。值得注意的是，与 DeepSeek-R1-1.5B 相比，我们在数学基准上平均 pass@1 提升 14.7%，编码提升 13.9%，逻辑谜题提升 54.8%，STEM 推理提升 25.1%，指令遵循任务提升 18.1%（图 1，右图）。更重要的是，ProRL 在空前的 2000 个训练步骤后仍显示出持续的性能提升（图 1，左图），表明 RL 训练随算力增加有效扩展。

items.en: Furthermore, Nemotron-Research-Reasoning-Qwen-1.5B offers surprising new insights —RL can indeed discover genuinely new solution pathways entirely absent in base models, when given sufficient training time and applied to novel reasoning tasks. Through comprehensive analysis, we show that our model generates novel insights and performs exceptionally well on tasks with increasingly difficult and out-of-domain tasks, suggesting a genuine expansion of reasoning capabilities beyond its initial training. Most strikingly, we identify many tasks where the base model fails to produce any correct solutions regardless of the amount of sampling, while our RL-trained model achieves 100% pass rates (Figure˜4). Interestingly, we find the amount of gain from RL on each task is predictable given the base model’s performance—RL expands a model’s reasoning boundary most effectively in domains where the base model initially struggles. Moreover, we quantify the novelty of the model’s reasoning trajectories using the Creativity Index lu2025aihumanityssalieriquantifying , which measures the amount of overlap with a pretraining corpus. We find that prolonged RL training leads to trajectories with higher novelty (Figure˜1, Middle), indicating the emergence of new reasoning patterns during RL.
items.zh: 此外，Nemotron-Research-Reasoning-Qwen-1.5B 提供了令人惊讶的新见解——当给予足够的训练时间并应用于新颖推理任务时，RL 确实能够发现基础模型中完全不存在的全新解决方案路径。通过全面分析，我们表明我们的模型生成了新颖见解，并在日益困难且超出分布的任务上表现异常出色，暗示推理能力在其初始训练之外得到了真正扩展。最引人注目的是，我们识别出许多任务，其中基础模型无论采样多少都无法产生任何正确解决方案，而我们的 RL 训练模型达到了 100% 的通过率（图 4）。有趣的是，我们发现每个任务上 RL 带来的收益量可以根据基础模型的性能进行预测——RL 在基础模型最初挣扎的领域中最有效地扩展模型的推理边界。此外，我们使用创造力指数 (lu2025aihumanityssalieriquantifying) 量化模型推理轨迹的新颖性，该指数衡量与预训练语料库的重叠量。我们发现长时间 RL 训练导致具有更高新颖性的轨迹（图 1，中图），表明 RL 过程中出现了新的推理模式。

items.en: Our findings hold significant implications for the broader AI community, demonstrating that RL approaches can indeed enhance model capabilities without requiring additional training data. Through sustained exploration, models can develop new knowledge and reasoning strategies that potentially exceed human insights. This work reaffirms the value of reinforcement learning as a pathway toward more capable and generalizable AI systems, challenging previous assumptions about the inherent limitations of these approaches.
items.zh: 我们的发现对更广泛的 AI 社区具有重要启示，表明 RL 方法确实可以在不需要额外训练数据的情况下增强模型能力。通过持续探索，模型可以发展出可能超越人类见解的新知识和推理策略。这项工作重申了强化学习作为通向更强大和更通用 AI 系统路径的价值，挑战了先前关于这些方法固有局限的假设。

items.en: We begin with a brief overview of the GRPO shao2024deepseekmath algorithm. We then address key challenges in prolonged RL training, such as entropy collapse and instability, by introducing a KL divergence penalty and periodic resets of the reference policy. This ensures stable training across many epochs and continued performance improvement.
items.zh: 我们首先简要概述 GRPO (shao2024deepseekmath) 算法。然后，我们通过引入 KL 散度惩罚和参考策略的周期性重置来解决长时间 RL 训练中的关键挑战，如熵崩溃和不稳定性。这确保了跨多个 epoch 的稳定训练和持续的性能提升。

items.en: We adopt Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) shao2024deepseekmath as the core RL algorithm. Compared with Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) schulman2017proximalpolicyoptimizationalgorithms , it removes the value model and instead use baseline estimates based on group scores. Formally the GRPO maximizes the following objective:
items.zh: 我们采用组相对策略优化（GRPO）(shao2024deepseekmath) 作为核心 RL 算法。与近端策略优化（PPO）(schulman2017proximalpolicyoptimizationalgorithms) 相比，它去除了价值模型，而是使用基于组得分的基线估计。形式上，GRPO 最大化以下目标：

items.en: where τ\tau is the response sampled from the current policy πθ\pi_{\theta}. rθ​(τ)=πθ​(τ)πo​l​d​(τ)r_{\theta}(\tau)=\frac{\pi_{\theta}(\tau)}{\pi_{old}(\tau)} is the probability ratio between the current policy and old policy before each actor update. The advantage used in GRPO foregoese the critic model of PPO, and instead estimates baseline from group scores {Ri}i∈G​(τ)\{R_{i}\}_{i\in G(\tau)}:
items.zh: 其中 τ 是从当前策略 πθ 采样的响应。rθ(τ)=πθ(τ)/πold(τ) 是当前策略与每次 actor 更新前旧策略的概率比。GRPO 中使用的优势函数省略了 PPO 的评论家模型，而是从组得分 {Ri}i∈G(τ) 估计基线：

items.en: A key challenge in prolonged policy optimization is entropy collapse, a phenomenon where the model’s output distribution becomes overly peaked early in training, resulting in sharply reduced entropy. When entropy collapses, the policy prematurely commits to a narrow set of outputs, severely limiting exploration. This is particularly detrimental in methods like GRPO, where the learning signal depends on having a diverse set of sampled outputs to effectively estimate relative advantages. Without sufficient exploration, policy updates become biased, leading to stagnation in training.
items.zh: 长时间策略优化的一个关键挑战是熵崩溃，即模型输出分布在训练早期变得过于尖锐，导致熵急剧降低。当熵崩溃时，策略过早地承诺于狭窄的输出集，严重限制了探索。这在 GRPO 等方法中尤其有害，因为学习信号依赖于多样化的采样输出来有效估计相对优势。没有充分的探索，策略更新会变得有偏，导致训练停滞。

items.en: A common mitigation strategy is to increase the sampling temperature during rollouts. However, we find that this approach only delays the onset of entropy collapse rather than preventing it altogether, as entropy continues to decline steadily as training progresses. Nonethenless, we did employ high rollout temperature since encourages exploration by increasing the initial entropy.
items.zh: 一种常见的缓解策略是在 rollout 期间提高采样温度。然而，我们发现这种方法只能延迟熵崩溃的发生，而不能完全阻止它，因为熵随着训练进行持续下降。尽管如此，我们确实采用了高 rollout 温度，因为它通过增加初始熵来鼓励探索。

full.sec: 2.3 Decoupled Clip and Dynamic Sampling Policy Optimization (DAPO)
full.secZh: 2.3 解耦裁剪与动态采样策略优化（DAPO）

items.en: To address entropy collapse, we adopt several components from the DAPO algorithm yu2025dapoopensourcellmreinforcement , which are specifically designed to maintain exploration and output diversity. First, DAPO introduces decoupled clipping, where the lower and upper clipping bounds in the PPO objective are treated as separate hyperparameters:
items.zh: 为了解决熵崩溃，我们采用了 DAPO 算法 (yu2025dapoopensourcellmreinforcement) 的几个组件，这些组件专门设计用于维持探索和输出多样性。首先，DAPO 引入了解耦裁剪，其中 PPO 目标中的下界和上界裁剪边界被视为独立的超参数：

items.en: By setting a higher value for ϵh​i​g​h\epsilon_{high}, the algorithm promotes ‘clip-higher’, uplifting the probabilities of previously unlikely tokens and encouraging broader exploration. We find that this modification helps retain entropy and reduces premature mode collapse.
items.zh: 通过设置更高的 ϵhigh 值，算法促进“裁剪更高”，提升先前不太可能 token 的概率，鼓励更广泛的探索。我们发现这种修改有助于保持熵并减少过早的模式崩溃。

items.en: Additionally, DAPO employs dynamic sampling, filtering out prompts for which the model consistently succeeds or fails (i.e., accuracy 1 or 0), as these provide no learning signal. This focus on intermediate difficulty examples further helps maintain a diverse learning signal during training.
items.zh: 此外，DAPO 采用动态采样，过滤掉模型持续成功或失败（即准确率为 1 或 0）的提示，因为这些提示不提供学习信号。这种对中等难度示例的关注进一步有助于在训练期间维持多样化的学习信号。

items.en: While DAPO and temperature adjustment help slow entropy collapse, we find that explicit regularization via a KL divergence penalty provides a stronger and more stable solution. Specifically, we incorporate a KL penalty between the current policy πθ\pi_{\theta} and a reference policy πr​e​f\pi_{ref}:
items.zh: 虽然 DAPO 和温度调整有助于减缓熵崩溃，但我们发现通过 KL 散度惩罚进行显式正则化提供了更强且更稳定的解决方案。具体来说，我们在当前策略 πθ 和参考策略 πref 之间加入 KL 惩罚：

items.en: This penalty not only helps maintain entropy but also serves as a regularizer to prevent the online policy from drifting too far from a stable reference, stabilizing learning and mitigating overfitting to spurious reward signals.
items.zh: 这种惩罚不仅有助于维持熵，还作为正则化器防止在线策略偏离稳定参考太远，稳定学习并减轻对虚假奖励信号的过拟合。

items.en: Recent works yu2025dapoopensourcellmreinforcement ; deepcoder2025 ; yue2025vapoefficientreliablereinforcement ; skywork-or1-2025 have argued for the removal of the KL penalty, citing that models naturally diverge during training on chain-of-thought reasoning tasks. We observe that this perspective often applies to base models prior to any supervised fine-tuning. In contrast, we begin from a well-initialized checkpoint (DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-1.5B) already capable of generating coherent CoT outputs. In this context, retaining a KL penalty is still beneficial for both stability and sustained entropy.
items.zh: 最近的工作 (yu2025dapoopensourcellmreinforcement; deepcoder2025; yue2025vapoefficientreliablereinforcement; skywork-or1-2025) 主张移除 KL 惩罚，理由是模型在链式思维推理任务训练中自然会发散。我们观察到这种观点通常适用于任何监督微调之前的基础模型。相比之下，我们从已经能够生成连贯 CoT 输出的良好初始化检查点（DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-1.5B）开始。在这种情况下，保留 KL 惩罚对于稳定性和持续熵仍然有益。

items.en: We further observe that as training progresses, the KL term may increasingly dominate the loss, leading to diminishing policy updates. To alleviate this, we introduce a simple yet effective technique: reference policy reset. Periodically, we hard-reset the reference policy πr​e​f\pi_{ref} to a more recent snapshot of the online policy πθ\pi_{\theta}, and reinitialize the optimizer states. This allows the model to continue improving while maintaining the benefits of KL regularization. We apply this reset strategy throughout training to avoid premature convergence and encourage prolonged training.
items.zh: 我们进一步观察到，随着训练的进行，KL项可能逐渐主导损失函数，导致策略更新减少。为了缓解这一问题，我们引入了一种简单而有效的技术：参考策略重置。我们定期将参考策略π_ref硬重置为在线策略π_θ的较新快照，并重新初始化优化器状态。这使得模型能够在保持KL正则化优势的同时继续改进。我们在整个训练过程中应用这种重置策略，以避免过早收敛并鼓励长时间训练。

full.sec: 3 Nemotron-Research-Reasoning-Qwen-1.5B: The World’s Best 1.5B Reasoning Model

items.en: We present Nemotron-Research-Reasoning-Qwen-1.5B, a generalist model trained via reinforcement learning on a diverse, verifiable dataset of 136K problems across math, code, STEM, logic puzzles, and instruction following. Leveraging stable reward computation, improved GRPO, and prolonged training, our model achieves strong generalization across domains. It outperforms DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-1.5B by +15.7% on math, +14.4% on code, +25.9% on STEM, +22.0% on instruction following, and +54.8% on text-based logic puzzles Reasoning Gym111https://github.com/open-thought/reasoning-gym. It also surpasses domain-specialized baselines in both math (+4.6%) and code (+6.5%), demonstrating the effectiveness of generalist prolonged RL training.
items.zh: 我们提出了Nemotron-Research-Reasoning-Qwen-1.5B，这是一个通用模型，通过强化学习在一个包含136K个问题的多样化可验证数据集上训练，涵盖数学、代码、STEM、逻辑谜题和指令遵循。利用稳定的奖励计算、改进的GRPO和长时间训练，我们的模型在多个领域实现了强泛化。它在数学上比DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-1.5B高出15.7%，代码上高出14.4%，STEM上高出25.9%，指令遵循上高出22.0%，基于文本的逻辑谜题上高出54.8%（Reasoning Gym）。它还在数学（+4.6%）和代码（+6.5%）上超越了领域专用基线，证明了通用长时间RL训练的有效性。

items.en: We construct a diverse and verifiable training dataset spanning 136K examples in five task domains, math, code, STEM, logical puzzles, and instruction following, to enable robust reinforcement learning from a wide range of reasoning problems. Each task type is paired with a clear reward signal (binary or continuous), allowing for reliable feedback during training. This broad task coverage encourages generalization beyond narrow domains and enables meaningful comparison of RL algorithms across diverse reward structures. Details on the composition of training dataset is presented in Appendix˜D.
items.zh: 我们构建了一个多样且可验证的训练数据集，涵盖五个任务领域的136K个示例：数学、代码、STEM、逻辑谜题和指令遵循，以便从广泛的推理问题中进行稳健的强化学习。每种任务类型都配有清晰的奖励信号（二元或连续），允许在训练过程中获得可靠的反馈。这种广泛的任务覆盖鼓励了超越狭窄领域的泛化，并使得能够在不同奖励结构下对RL算法进行有意义的比较。训练数据集的组成细节见附录D。

items.en: We use verl Sheng_2025 for reinforcement learning training. We adopt enhancements of GRPO shao2024deepseekmath proposed by DAPO yu2025dapoopensourcellmreinforcement , decoupling clipping hyperparameters with ϵl​o​w=0.2,ϵh​i​g​h=0.4\epsilon_{low}=0.2,\epsilon_{high}=0.4, and dynamic sampling for filtering prompts that are too easy or difficult (with accuracy equal to 1 and 0). For rollout, we sample n=16n=16 responses for each prompt with a context window limit of 8096 and use a high sampling temperature of 1.2. We set batch size to 256 and mini-batch size to 64 (equating to 4 gradient updates per rollout step). For training we use the AdamW loshchilov2019decoupledweightdecayregularization optimizer with a constant learning rate of 2×10−62\times 10^{-6}. We conduct training on 4 8 x NVIDIA-H100-80GB nodes, and the whole training runs for approximately 16k GPUs hours.
items.zh: 我们使用verl（Sheng_2025）进行强化学习训练。我们采用了DAPO（yu2025dapoopensource）提出的GRPO（shao2024deepseekmath）增强，解耦了裁剪超参数，设置ε_low=0.2，ε_high=0.4，并采用动态采样过滤过于简单或困难的提示（准确率为1和0）。对于rollout，我们对每个提示采样n=16个响应，上下文窗口限制为8096，并使用1.2的高采样温度。我们设置批次大小为256，小批次大小为64（相当于每个rollout步骤进行4次梯度更新）。训练使用AdamW优化器（loshchilov2019decoupled），学习率恒定为2×10^{-6}。我们在4个8×NVIDIA-H100-80GB节点上进行训练，整个训练大约需要16k GPU小时。

items.en: To enable effective long-horizon reinforcement learning, we monitor training progress using a blended validation set derived from the evaluation benchmark. When validation performance stagnates or degrades, we perform a hard reset of the reference model and optimizer. This not only restores training stability but also facilitates greater policy divergence from the base model. Throughout most of training, we cap response length at 8k tokens to maintain concise and stable generations. In the final stage (~200 steps), we increase the context window to 16k tokens, observing that the model adapts quickly and achieves measurable improvements. We detail our training recipe in Appendix E.
items.zh: 为了实现有效的长程强化学习，我们使用来自评估基准的混合验证集监控训练进度。当验证性能停滞或下降时，我们对参考模型和优化器执行硬重置。这不仅恢复了训练稳定性，还促进了策略与基础模型的更大差异。在大部分训练过程中，我们将响应长度限制在8k个token，以保持简洁稳定的生成。在最后阶段（约200步），我们将上下文窗口增加到16k个token，观察到模型快速适应并实现了可衡量的改进。我们在附录E中详细介绍了训练方案。

items.en: Evaluation Benchmarks. We evaluate models on the breadth of various tasks across math, coding, reasoning, and instruction following. For math, we follow DeepScaleR deepscaler2025 and SimpleRL zeng2025simplerl , and evaluate on AIME2024 AIME2024 , AIME2025 AIME2025 , AMC AMC (composed of AMC2022 and AMC2023), MATH hendrycks2021measuringmathematicalproblemsolving , Minerva Math lewkowycz2022solvingquantitativereasoningproblems , and Olympiad Bench he2024olympiadbenchchallengingbenchmarkpromoting . For coding, we use the validation set from PRIME cui2025process consisted of APPS hendrycks2021measuringcodingchallengecompetence , Codecontests Li_2022 , Codeforces222https://huggingface.co/datasets/MatrixStudio/Codeforces-Python-Submissions, and TACO li2023tacotopicsalgorithmiccode . We also include benchmarks HumanevalPlus evalplus and LiveCodeBench jain2024livecodebenchholisticcontaminationfree . For logic puzzles, we reserved 100 samples from each reasoning gym tasks as test datasets for evaluation. In addition, we use a curated subset333https://huggingface.co/datasets/spawn99/GPQA-diamond-ClaudeR1 from GPQA Diamond rein2023gpqagraduatelevelgoogleproofqa and IFEval bae2025onlinedifficultyfilteringreasoning to evaluate the capability of our models in STEM reasoning and instruction following zhou2023instructionfollowingevaluationlargelanguage .
items.zh: 评估基准。我们在数学、编码、推理和指令遵循等广泛任务上评估模型。对于数学，我们遵循DeepScaleR（deepscaler2025）和SimpleRL（zeng2025simplerl），并在AIME2024、AIME2025、AMC（由AMC2022和AMC2023组成）、MATH（hendrycks2021measuring）、Minerva Math（lewkowycz2022solving）和Olympiad Bench（he2024olympiadbench）上评估。对于编码，我们使用PRIME（cui2025process）的验证集，包括APPS（hendrycks2021measuring）、Codecontests（Li_2022）、Codeforces和TACO（li2023taco）。我们还包含HumanevalPlus（evalplus）和LiveCodeBench（jain2024livecodebench）基准。对于逻辑谜题，我们从每个推理体操任务中保留100个样本作为测试数据集。此外，我们使用来自GPQA Diamond（rein2023gpqa）的精选子集和IFEval（bae2025online）来评估模型在STEM推理和指令遵循（zhou2023instruction）方面的能力。

items.en: Evaluation Settings. We use vllm kwon2023efficient as the inference backend, with a sampling temperature of 0.6, nucleus sampling holtzman2020curiouscaseneuraltext with t​o​p​_​p=0.95top\_p=0.95 and maximum response length of 32k. For math, coding, and STEM reasoning tasks, we obtain estimates of pass@1 from 16 samples for each benchmark prompt from strictly binary rewards. For other tasks (logical puzzles and instruction following), we calculate the average continuous reward score from our rule-based verifiers. We evaluate and report benchmark results for open-source models using our own evaluation settings.
items.zh: 评估设置。我们使用vllm（kwon2023efficient）作为推理后端，采样温度为0.6，核采样（holtzman2020curious）的top_p=0.95，最大响应长度为32k。对于数学、编码和STEM推理任务，我们从每个基准提示的16个样本中，根据严格的二元奖励估计pass@1。对于其他任务（逻辑谜题和指令遵循），我们计算基于规则验证器的平均连续奖励分数。我们使用自己的评估设置评估并报告开源模型的基准结果。

items.en: Evaluation Results. We provide a detailed comparison between DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-1.5B and our final model Nemotron-Research-Reasoning-Qwen-1.5B across multiple domains. In the math domain shown in Table˜3, our model consistently outperforms the base model across benchmarks, showing an average improvement of 15.7%. For code domain results shown in Table˜3, our final model surpasses the base model in competitive programming tasks as measured by p​a​s​s​@​1pass@1 accuracy by 14.4%. Our model also demonstrates substantial gains in STEM reasoning and instruction following, with improvements of 25.9% on GPQA Diamond and 22.0% on IFEval. Our model achieves high accuracy on Reasoning Gym logic puzzles after training, despite the base model struggles with formatting and challenging subtasks, improving reward by 54.8%. Even compared to a much larger model, DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-7B, our model achieves comparable or even better performance across multiple domains.
items.zh: 评估结果。我们提供了DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-1.5B与我们的最终模型Nemotron-Research-Reasoning-Qwen-1.5B在多个领域的详细比较。在表3所示的数学领域，我们的模型在基准测试中始终优于基础模型，平均提升15.7%。对于表3所示的代码领域，我们的最终模型在竞争性编程任务中，以pass@1准确率衡量，超过基础模型14.4%。我们的模型在STEM推理和指令遵循方面也取得了显著提升，GPQA Diamond提升25.9%，IFEval提升22.0%。我们的模型在训练后在推理体操逻辑谜题上取得了高准确率，尽管基础模型在格式化和具有挑战性的子任务上存在困难，奖励提升了54.8%。即使与更大的模型DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-7B相比，我们的模型在多个领域也取得了相当甚至更好的性能。

items.en: Generalization to OOD Tasks. In Table˜3, we also present results on out-of-distribution (OOD) tasks in Reasoning Gym. Our model shows significant improvements on three OOD tasks, demonstrating stronger generalization beyond the training distribution. This highlights the effectiveness of our training approach in enabling the model to adapt and perform well on unseen challenges.
items.zh: 对OOD任务的泛化。在表3中，我们还展示了推理体操中分布外（OOD）任务的结果。我们的模型在三个OOD任务上显示出显著改进，证明了在训练分布之外的更强泛化能力。这突显了我们的训练方法在使模型适应并良好应对未见挑战方面的有效性。

items.en: Comparision with Domain-Specialized Models. We compare the performance of Nemotron-Research-Reasoning-Qwen-1.5B with two domain-specialized baselines: DeepScaleR-1.5B deepscaler2025 , tailored for mathematical reasoning, and DeepCoder-1.5B deepcoder2025 , focused on competitive programming tasks. Our ProRL trained model enables strong generalization, achieving superior pass@1 scores on both math (+4.6%) and code (+6.5%) benchmarks. Additionaly, ProRL enables deeper exploration and refinement within limited response length, where prior works often increase training response length too early, causing "overthinking" sui2025stopoverthinkingsurveyefficient with verbose reasoning.
items.zh: 与领域专用模型的比较。我们将Nemotron-Research-Reasoning-Qwen-1.5B与两个领域专用基线进行比较：DeepScaleR-1.5B（deepscaler2025），专为数学推理设计；以及DeepCoder-1.5B（deepcoder2025），专注于竞争性编程任务。我们的ProRL训练模型实现了强泛化，在数学（+4.6%）和代码（+6.5%）基准上均取得了优越的pass@1分数。此外，ProRL在有限的响应长度内实现了更深入的探索和细化，而先前的工作往往过早增加训练响应长度，导致“过度思考”（sui2025stop）和冗长的推理。

items.capEn: Figure 3: Left: ProRL expands a model’s reasoning boundary most effectively on tasks where the base model initially struggles. Right: Tasks with minimal gains post-RL highlighted in the circle tend to have a lower creativity index, indicating higher overlap with pretraining data.
items.capZh: 图3：左图：ProRL在基础模型最初难以处理的任务上最有效地扩展了模型的推理边界。右图：圆圈中突出显示的RL后增益最小的任务往往具有较低的创造力指数，表明与预训练数据的重叠度较高。

full.sec: 4 Analysis: Does ProRL Elicit New Reasoning Patterns?
full.secZh: 4 分析：ProRL是否引发新的推理模式？

items.en: To evaluate whether prolonged ProRL training enhances reasoning beyond the base model, we increase inference samples to 256 and re-evaluate performance. Due to compute limits, we randomly select 18 Reasoning Gym tasks (out of 96) and re-run all other benchmarks: math, code, STEM reasoning, and instruction following. We compare the base model (DeepSeek-R1-Distilled-1.5B), an intermediate checkpoint, and Nemotron-Research-Reasoning-Qwen-1.5B (the final model after extended training).
items.zh: 为了评估长时间的ProRL训练是否增强了基础模型之外的推理能力，我们将推理样本增加到256个并重新评估性能。由于算力限制，我们随机选择18个推理体操任务（共96个），并重新运行所有其他基准：数学、代码、STEM推理和指令遵循。我们比较了基础模型（DeepSeek-R1-Distilled-1.5B）、一个中间检查点和Nemotron-Research-Reasoning-Qwen-1.5B（长时间训练后的最终模型）。

full.sec: 4.1 The Weaker the Start, the Stronger the Gain with ProRL

items.en: A key finding from our study is that the effectiveness of RL in expanding a model’s reasoning boundary (measured by pass@128) is strongly influenced by the base model’s initial capabilities. As shown in Figure˜3, we observe a significant negative correlation between the base model’s reasoning boundary and the extent of reasoning improvement after RL training. Specifically, tasks where the base model already performs well (i.e., high pass@128) tend to exhibit minimal or even negative gains in reasoning breadth post-RL. This indicates a narrowing of the reasoning boundary, where the model becomes more confident in a subset of solutions it already understands, rather than exploring new reasoning patterns. In contrast, in domains where the base model struggles, particularly those with a low initial pass@128, RL training is most effective. Here, ProRL not only improves pass@1, but also expands the model’s ability to explore and succeed in a broader range of reasoning paths. To further confirm our intuition that tasks with minimal gains post-RL are those the base model is familiar with, we compute the creativity index Lu2024AIAH of the base model’s responses for each task against the largest open-source pretraining corpus, DOLMA soldaini2024dolmaopencorpustrillion . The creativity index quantifies the degree of overlap between model’s responses and the some math and code tasks highlighted in the circle—tend to have lower creativity indices, suggesting the base model has seen a large amount of similar data during pretraining.
items.zh: 我们研究的一个关键发现是，RL在扩展模型推理边界（以pass@128衡量）方面的有效性受到基础模型初始能力的强烈影响。如图3所示，我们观察到基础模型的推理边界与RL训练后推理改进程度之间存在显著的负相关。具体来说，基础模型已经表现良好的任务（即高pass@128）在RL后往往表现出推理广度的最小甚至负增益。这表明推理边界变窄，模型对其已经理解的解决方案子集变得更加自信，而不是探索新的推理模式。相反，在基础模型难以处理的领域，特别是初始pass@128较低的任务，RL训练最为有效。在这里，ProRL不仅提高了pass@1，还扩展了模型探索和成功实现更广泛推理路径的能力。为了进一步证实我们的直觉，即RL后增益最小的任务是基础模型熟悉的任务，我们计算了基础模型对每个任务的响应的创造力指数（Lu2024AIAH），与最大的开源预训练语料库DOLMA（soldaini2024dolma）进行比较。创造力指数量化了模型响应与某些数学和代码任务（圆圈中突出显示）之间的重叠程度——这些任务往往具有较低的创造力指数，表明基础模型在预训练期间已经看到了大量类似数据。

full.sec: 4.2 Unpacking ProRL’s Reasoning Boundaries: Diminish, Plateau, and Sustained Gains
full.secZh: 4.2 解析ProRL的推理边界：衰减、平台与持续增益

items.en: We analyze performance trends on individual benchmarks and categorize them based on how pass@kk evolves throughout training. Our analysis reveals that reinforcement learning can meaningfully expand a model’s reasoning capacity, particularly on challenging tasks that extend beyond the capability of the base model. While some tasks exhibit early saturation or even regressions in reasoning breadth, we also observe clear instances where the model’s reasoning capabilities expand with continued training. Most notably, on some domains such as code generation, ProRL enables continued gains, suggesting that prolonged training allows the model to explore and internalize more sophisticated reasoning patterns. This demonstrates that, under the right conditions, ProRL can push the frontier of a model’s reasoning abilities beyond what the base model achieves.
items.zh: 我们分析了各个基准的性能趋势，并根据pass@k在训练过程中的演变对其进行分类。我们的分析表明，强化学习可以有意义地扩展模型的推理能力，特别是在超出基础模型能力的具有挑战性的任务上。虽然一些任务表现出早期饱和甚至推理广度下降，但我们也观察到模型推理能力随着持续训练而扩展的明显实例。最值得注意的是，在代码生成等某些领域，ProRL实现了持续增益，表明长时间训练允许模型探索并内化更复杂的推理模式。这表明，在适当条件下，ProRL可以将模型的推理能力前沿推至基础模型所能达到的水平之上。

items.capEn: Figure 4: Pass@kk comparison of the base model, an intermediate checkpoint, and the final RL-trained models. Trends are grouped into three regimes: (1) Diminish: reduced diversity due to narrow output distributions; (2) Plateau: early RL saturation of gains in reasoning boundary; and (3) Sustained: continued reasoning boundary improvement with prolonged training.
items.capZh: 图4：基础模型、中间检查点和最终RL训练模型的Pass@k比较。趋势分为三种模式：（1）减弱：由于输出分布狭窄导致多样性降低；（2）平台期：推理边界的RL增益早期饱和；（3）持续：长时间训练下推理边界持续改善。

items.en: Diminished Reasoning Boundary In some benchmarks (particularly in the math domain), Nemotron-Research-Reasoning-Qwen-1.5B exhibit decreased or unchanged reasoning capacity compared to the base model, aligning with observations of prior work yue2025doesreinforcementlearningreally . Although pass@1 improves, the pass@128 score, which reflects broader reasoning ability, often declines. These tasks tend to have a high baseline pass@128, suggesting that the base model already possesses sufficient reasoning ability, and RL training merely sharpens the output distribution at the expense of exploration and generality.
items.zh: 减弱的推理边界 在某些基准（特别是数学领域）中，Nemotron-Research-Reasoning-Qwen-1.5B表现出与基础模型相比推理能力下降或不变，这与先前工作的观察一致（yue2025does）。尽管pass@1有所提高，但反映更广泛推理能力的pass@128分数往往下降。这些任务通常具有较高的基线pass@128，表明基础模型已经具备足够的推理能力，RL训练仅仅以牺牲探索和通用性为代价来锐化输出分布。

items.en: Gains Plateau with RL For these tasks, RL training boosts both pass@1 and pass@128, indicating improved reasoning. However, these gains are largely achieved early in training. Comparing the intermediate and final checkpoints shows that ProRL offers negligible additional benefit, implying that the model quickly saturates its learning potential for these tasks.
items.zh: RL增益平台期 对于这些任务，RL训练同时提高了pass@1和pass@128，表明推理能力得到改善。然而，这些增益主要是在训练早期实现的。比较中间检查点和最终检查点表明，ProRL提供的额外收益可以忽略不计，意味着模型在这些任务上迅速饱和了其学习潜力。

items.en: Sustained Gains from ProRL In contrast, some benchmarks, particularly more complex ones such as coding, Nemotron-Research-Reasoning-Qwen-1.5B show continued improvements in reasoning capacity with prolonged RL training. These tasks likely require extensive exploration of diverse problem instances during training to generalize effectively to the test set. In such cases, ProRL expands the model’s reasoning boundaries.
items.zh: ProRL的持续增益 相比之下，一些基准，特别是更复杂的基准（如编码），Nemotron-Research-Reasoning-Qwen-1.5B显示出随着长时间RL训练推理能力的持续提升。这些任务可能需要在训练期间对多样的问题实例进行广泛探索，以便有效泛化到测试集。在这种情况下，ProRL扩展了模型的推理边界。

items.en: We focus on how ProRL influences the model’s ability to generalize beyond the distribution of its training data. These studies aim to isolate the role of extended RL updates in expanding the model’s reasoning boundaries, especially on structurally novel or semantically challenging tasks that were not encountered during initial training.
items.zh: 我们关注ProRL如何影响模型在训练数据分布之外的泛化能力。这些研究旨在隔离扩展RL更新在扩展模型推理边界方面的作用，特别是在初始训练中未遇到的结构新颖或语义具有挑战性的任务上。

items.capEn: Figure 5: Expanded reasoning boundary for OOD task boxnet.
items.capZh: 图5：OOD任务boxnet的推理边界扩展。

items.en: Out-of-Distribution (OOD) Task We evaluate the model on Reasoning Gym task boxnet, which was not seen during training. As shown in Figure˜5 (Check Appendix C.3 for an example), the base model exhibits no capability of solving the task. In contrast, the model trained with ProRL demonstrates a significant ability to solve the problem, indicating a clear expansion in the model’s reasoning boundary, generalizing to out-of-distribution tasks unseen during training. Furthermore, when comparing an intermediate RL checkpoint with the final prolonged RL model, we observe that extended training sustains and amplifies performance gains consistently across all values of kk. These results further support the conclusion that ProRL enables the model to internalize abstract reasoning patterns that generalize beyond specific training distributions or complexity levels.
items.zh: 分布外（OOD）任务 我们在训练中未见过的推理Gym任务boxnet上评估模型。如图5所示（示例见附录C.3），基础模型完全没有解决该任务的能力。相比之下，使用ProRL训练的模型展现出显著的解题能力，表明模型的推理边界明显扩展，泛化到了训练中未见过的分布外任务。此外，比较中间RL检查点和最终长时间RL模型时，我们观察到扩展训练在所有k值上持续且放大了性能提升。这些结果进一步支持了ProRL使模型能够内化抽象推理模式，这些模式泛化到特定训练分布或复杂度水平之外的结论。

items.capEn: Figure 6: ProRL generalizes to increased task difficulty on graph_color.
items.capZh: 图6：ProRL在graph_color任务上泛化到更高难度。

items.en: Increased Task Difficulty We evaluate performance across varying levels of task difficulty for graph_color task (Check Appendix C.1 for an example) by generating graph problems with different numbers of graph nodes. While the training data only includes graphs of size 10, we test on larger graphs to assess generalization beyond the training regime. Figure˜6 plots the pass@1 (solid lines) and pass@128 (dashed lines) across different models. The results reveal a consistent decline in performance as task difficulty increases, which is expected given the combinatorial growth in solution space. However, our prolonged RL model maintains significantly higher accuracy across all graph sizes compared to both the base and intermediate models. This indicates that extended RL updates not only enhance pass@1 on in-distribution tasks but also improve the model’s robustness to more complex, unseen scenarios.
items.zh: 增加任务难度 我们通过生成不同节点数的图问题，评估graph_color任务在不同难度水平上的表现（示例见附录C.1）。虽然训练数据仅包含大小为10的图，我们测试了更大的图以评估训练范围之外的泛化能力。图6绘制了不同模型的pass@1（实线）和pass@128（虚线）。结果显示，随着任务难度增加，性能持续下降，这在意料之中，因为解空间呈组合增长。然而，与基础模型和中间模型相比，我们的长时间RL模型在所有图大小上保持了显著更高的准确率。这表明，扩展的RL更新不仅提高了分布内任务的pass@1，还增强了模型对更复杂、未见场景的鲁棒性。

full.sec: 4.4 How Does pass@1 Distributions Evolve as ProRL Progresses?
full.secZh: 4.4 随着ProRL推进，pass@1分布如何演变？

items.en: Dang et al dang_assessing_2025 derived a mathematical upper bound for pass@kk as:
items.zh: Dang等人 dang_assessing_2025 推导了pass@k的数学上界为：

items.en: where ρx\rho_{x} represents the pass@1 accuracy for task xx. While increasing expected pass@1 raises this upper bound, higher variance reduces it. In contrast to dang_assessing_2025 ’s observation of declining pass@kk during training, our results in Figure 1 demonstrate continuous improvement in both pass@1 and pass@16, reproducing the scaling law patterns reported for OpenAI O1’s RL training noauthor_learning_nodate . Our ProRL approach generates substantial performance gains across diverse tasks. Figures 7(a) and 7(b) illustrate significant rightward distribution shifts in code and logic puzzle tasks. Initially concentrated near zero with extended tails, the pass@1 distributions evolved markedly after training. Codeforces problems exhibit broader distribution patterns post-training, while the family_relationships task (Appendix C.2 for an example), which is a novel reasoning challenge, demonstrate a dramatic shift from predominantly zero accuracy to peaking at perfect accuracy, indicating successful solution discovery across the majority of prompts. These pronounced distribution changes, driven by extended RL training, produce sufficient improvement in expected pass@1 to overcome any negative effects from increased variance.
items.zh: 其中ρx表示任务x的pass@1准确率。虽然增加期望pass@1会提高这个上界，但更高的方差会降低它。与dang_assessing_2025 观察到的训练中pass@k下降相反，我们的图1结果显示pass@1和pass@16持续改进，重现了OpenAI O1的RL训练中报告的缩放定律模式 noauthor_learning_nodate。我们的ProRL方法在多种任务上产生了显著的性能提升。图7(a)和7(b)展示了代码和逻辑谜题任务中明显的右移分布变化。初始时集中在零附近且有长尾，训练后pass@1分布显著演变。Codeforces问题在训练后表现出更宽的分布模式，而family_relationships任务（示例见附录C.2）作为一种新颖的推理挑战，从主要为零准确率戏剧性地转变为在完美准确率处达到峰值，表明在大多数提示中成功发现了解决方案。这些由扩展RL训练驱动的显著分布变化，使得期望pass@1有足够改进，以克服方差增加带来的任何负面影响。

items.en: Reasoning Models Reasoning models represent a specialized category of AI systems that engage in detailed, long chain-of-thought before generating final answers, a concept first introduced by OpenAI’s o1 series models openai2024openaio1card . Subsequently, DeepSeek (guo2025deepseek, ) and Kimi (kimiteam2025kimik15scalingreinforcement, ) detail methodologies for training reasoning models using reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR). Both approaches have popularized RL algorithms like GRPO shao2024deepseekmath , Mirror Descenttomar2021mirrordescentpolicyoptimization , RLOO ahmadian2024basicsrevisitingreinforcestyle and other variants. While numerous open-source efforts have attempted to reproduce o1-like models, most focus on single domains deepscaler2025 ; deepcoder2025 ; zeng2025simplerlzooinvestigatingtamingzero or study test-time compute scaling snell2024scalingllmtesttimecompute , with few addressing prolonged reinforcement learning training or examining RL training time scaling laws. As widely acknowledged in the reinforcement learning community, RL training presents significant challenges due to its sensitivity to hyperparameters wang2025reinforcementlearningenhancedllms . Various reinforcement learning techniques yue2025vapoefficientreliablereinforcement ; yu2025dapoopensourcellmreinforcement have been studied to enhance training stability for sustained optimization periods. Our research demonstrates that achieving prolonged RL training can substantially expand the boundaries of reasoning capabilities in these models.
items.zh: 推理模型 推理模型代表了一类专门的AI系统，它们在生成最终答案之前进行详细的长思维链推理，这一概念由OpenAI的o1系列模型首次引入 openai2024openaio1card。随后，DeepSeek (guo2025deepseek) 和Kimi (kimiteam2025kimik15scalingreinforcement) 详细介绍了使用可验证奖励的强化学习（RLVR）训练推理模型的方法。这两种方法都推广了RL算法，如GRPO shao2024deepseekmath、Mirror Descent tomar2021mirrordescentpolicyoptimization、RLOO ahmadian2024basicsrevisitingreinforcestyle 及其他变体。尽管许多开源工作试图复现o1类模型，但大多数集中在单一领域 deepscaler2025; deepcoder2025; zeng2025simplerlzooinvestigatingtamingzero，或研究测试时算力缩放 snell2024scalingllmtesttimecompute，很少有工作涉及长时间强化学习训练或研究RL训练时间缩放定律。正如强化学习社区广泛承认的，RL训练因其对超参数的敏感性而面临重大挑战 wang2025reinforcementlearningenhancedllms。已经研究了各种强化学习技术 yue2025vapoefficientreliablereinforcement; yu2025dapoopensource llmreinforcement 以增强训练稳定性，实现持续优化。我们的研究表明，实现长时间RL训练可以显著扩展这些模型的推理能力边界。

items.en: RL Reasoning Boundary Achieving superhuman performance has been the holy grail of machine learning, with reinforcement learning algorithms successfully delivering on this expectation, starting with DeepQ networks for Atari games mnih2013playingatarideepreinforcement ; mnih2015human . More recently, AlphaGo and AlphaZero silver2017mastering have demonstrated that AI agents can enhance their performance indefinitely by continuously iterating between data collection via Monte Carlo Tree Search and policy improvement. These examples show that RL training helps agents develop novel techniques not present in their base models chu2025sft ; schmied2025llmsgreedyagentseffects ; zelikman2022star ; zelikman2024quiet ; gandhi2025cognitive . However, challenging this perspective, several recent studies question whether RL training genuinely enhances the reasoning capacity of LLMs. One work yue2025doesreinforcementlearningreally argue that the RLVR method fails to extend this capacity, as evidenced by pass@kk metrics showing no improvement and in some cases deterioration, compared to the base model, a trend echoed by other researchers dang_assessing_2025 . Similarly, another work zhao2025echochamberrlposttraining finds that RL algorithms tend to converge toward a dominant output distribution, merely amplifying existing pretraining patterns. Beyond pass@kk metrics, alternative measurements like creativity index lu2025aihumanityssalieriquantifying can also determine whether models learn new ideas through RL training, which we employ during our studies.
items.zh: RL推理边界 实现超人类性能一直是机器学习的圣杯，强化学习算法成功实现了这一期望，从用于Atari游戏的DeepQ网络开始 mnih2013playingatarideepreinforcement; mnih2015human。最近，AlphaGo和AlphaZero silver2017mastering 证明了AI智能体可以通过在蒙特卡洛树搜索的数据收集和策略改进之间持续迭代，无限提升其性能。这些例子表明，RL训练帮助智能体开发出基础模型中不存在的新技术 chu2025sft; schmied2025llmsgreedyagentseffects; zelikman2022star; zelikman2024quiet; gandhi2025cognitive。然而，挑战这一观点的是，最近几项研究质疑RL训练是否真正增强了LLM的推理能力。一项工作 yue2025doesreinforcementlearningreally 认为RLVR方法未能扩展这种能力，因为pass@k指标显示与基础模型相比没有改进，甚至在某些情况下恶化，这一趋势也得到了其他研究者的呼应 dang_assessing_2025。类似地，另一项工作 zhao2025echochamberrlposttraining 发现RL算法倾向于收敛到主导输出分布，仅仅放大了现有的预训练模式。除了pass@k指标，其他测量指标如创造力指数 lu2025aihumanityssalieriquantifying 也可以确定模型是否通过RL训练学习了新想法，我们在研究中采用了这些指标。

items.en: In this work, we address whether reinforcement learning can truly expand language models’ reasoning boundaries. Through our introduction of ProRL, we provide compelling evidence that extended, stable RL training develops novel reasoning patterns beyond a base model’s initial capabilities. ProRL incorporates KL divergence penalties and periodic reference policy resets to maintain training stability over long durations. Using this approach, we developed a state-of-the-art 1.5B parameter generalist reasoning model trained on diverse datasets spanning mathematics, coding, STEM, logical puzzles, and instruction following tasks. Our analysis reveals ProRL is particularly effective for tasks where the base model initially struggles. Most importantly, ProRL enables strong generalization to out-of-distribution tasks and increasingly complex problems, demonstrating that extended RL training helps models internalize abstract reasoning patterns transferable beyond the training distribution. These results challenge previous assumptions about RL’s limitations and establish that sufficient training time with appropriate techniques can meaningfully expand reasoning boundaries, providing valuable direction for development of more capable reasoning models.
items.zh: 在这项工作中，我们探讨了强化学习是否能够真正扩展语言模型的推理边界。通过引入ProRL，我们提供了令人信服的证据，表明长时间、稳定的RL训练能够开发出超越基础模型初始能力的新推理模式。ProRL结合了KL散度惩罚和定期参考策略重置，以在长时间内保持训练稳定性。使用这种方法，我们开发了一个最先进的1.5B参数通用推理模型，在涵盖数学、编程、STEM、逻辑谜题和指令遵循任务的多领域数据集上训练。我们的分析显示，ProRL对于基础模型最初难以处理的任务特别有效。最重要的是，ProRL实现了对分布外任务和日益复杂问题的强泛化，表明扩展的RL训练帮助模型内化可迁移到训练分布之外的抽象推理模式。这些结果挑战了先前关于RL局限性的假设，并证明使用适当技术的足够训练时间可以有意义地扩展推理边界，为开发更强大的推理模型提供了宝贵方向。

items.en: We sincerely thank Shrimai Prabhumoye for the insightful discussions that significantly inspired our work. We are also grateful to Sahil Jain for sharing his perspectives on addressing entropy collapse. Additionally, we thank Makesh Narsimhan Sreedhar and David Mosallanezhad for their assistance with running several model evaluations.
items.zh: 我们衷心感谢Shrimai Prabhumoye的深刻讨论，这些讨论极大地启发了我们的工作。我们也感谢Sahil Jain分享他关于解决熵崩溃的观点。此外，我们感谢Makesh Narsimhan Sreedhar和David Mosallanezhad协助运行多个模型评估。
